title: dispatch fairness + quotas
manager: Dispatch fairness and quotas — `dispatch: fifo | fair` plus per-member quotas — so no single machine can starve the others or monopolize the dispatcher. FIFO is deterministic-simple; fair dispatch with quotas is what keeps a busy member from hogging the whole system, which starts to matter once populations get large and their traffic uneven.
cs: `dispatch: fifo|fair` + per-member quotas (§22); prevents starvation/monopoly; fair mode stays deterministic under the declared policy.
